reasoning: The market price on Polymarket as of August 7, 2025, was 0.01, indicating that "The Bear" is considered a massive underdog to win Outstanding Comedy Series at the 77th Emmys. Additionally, last year it lost this very category to "Hacks," establishing "Hacks" as a reigning favorite. This year, "The Bear" also faces fierce competition from a highly acclaimed new show, Apple TV+'s "The Studio," which tied "The Bear's" old record with 23 nominations. With the overwhelming momentum against it acting in concert with the 1% market probability, placing the probability at the minimum allowed bound (0.02) is well justified.
